title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Luminous Power Technologies International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Luminous Power Technologies International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Luminous Power Technologies International Enterprises has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Surat office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Luminous Power Technologies International Enterprises:
Luminous Power Technologies International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Luminous Power Technologies International Enterprises!
